parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort field. Prefix with - for descending. Allowed: id, name, net_days, discount_percentage, discount_days, due_date_type, is_default, created_at, updated_at

parameters.name: filter[due_date_type]
parameters.description: Exact match. Values: immediate, from_invoice_date, end_of_month, end_of_next_month, day_of_month

parameters.name: filter[is_default]
parameters.description: Exact match. Filter by default payment term flag (true/false)

parameters.name: filter[archived]
parameters.description: Archive filter. Values: only (archived only), all (include archived), omit for active only

parameters.name: filter[search]
parameters.description: Search across id, name, description fields
